description: Style NoteNail that corporate style with these shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. What's more, its designed with an ultra-fashionable cut and four-hole lace-ups!Product DetailsBlack leather upper with central lace-ups and brand badgeCushioned footbed, upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole, upraised at the heel, with branded grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
